author: CODER
summary: Use task-local observations.jsonl as the canonical machine-readable journal instead of HTML or README Findings.
decision: Keep README Findings as summary, ACR as evidence pointer, and observations.jsonl as the raw structured signal source.
impact: Downstream mining for issues, incidents, context, skills, and agent improvements can consume structured append-only entries without parsing prose.

author: AGENT
summary: CLI cold-start baseline guard showed a borderline transient task_list timeout during pre-push, then passed on immediate rerun.

recommended_action.title: Review cold-start guard timeout stability
recommended_action.details: Pre-push failed once with task_list median 10032ms against 10000ms, while immediate bench:cli:cold:check rerun passed with task_list 1439ms. Consider whether the guard needs better retry/reporting semantics before raising thresholds.
